title: polypogon ciliatus
intro: Polypogon ciliatus, also known as hair grass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Polypogon ciliatus include treating wounds, reducing fever, and soothing digestive issues. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
